## Guardrail Checklist

- [ ] I checked whether design docs are required under `docs/designs/`.
- [ ] Generated findings use evidence-first language.
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, personal credentials, or private case notes.
- [ ] Public-demo vs private-operational data handling is documented if changed.
- [ ] Dashboard/report JSON contracts are preserved or migration notes are included.
- [ ] Relevant tests or validation commands are listed below.
